  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingRobot",
    "deviceTitle": "AIMeE Bot",
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "On": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Robot on/off state.",
        "access": "Read Write"
      },
      "Power": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Returns 1 if robot battery has charge.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "Mode": {
        "dataType": "Integer",
        "range": "0-6",
        "description": "Robot operating mode: 0=Inactive, 1=MoveToTarget, 2=FollowTarget, 3=RoamArea, 4=Mine, 5=PathToTarget, 6=SmartMining.",
        "access": "Read Write"
      },
      "Error": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Returns 1 if robot is in error state (stuck, no path, battery dead, etc).",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "ReferenceId": {
        "dataType": "Hash",
        "range": "Unique",
        "description": "Unique reference ID.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "PositionX": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Robot's current X world position.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "PositionY": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Robot's current Y world position.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "PositionZ": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Robot's current Z world position.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "TargetX": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Target X world position for robot to move to.",
        "access": "Write"
      },
      "TargetY": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Target Y world position for robot to move to.",
        "access": "Write"
      },
      "TargetZ": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Target Z world position for robot to move to.",
        "access": "Write"
      },
      "VelocityX": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Robot's velocity in X direction.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "VelocityY": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Robot's velocity in Y direction.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "VelocityZ": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Robot's velocity in Z direction.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "VelocityMagnitude": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+",
        "description": "Robot's total velocity magnitude.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "VelocityRelativeX": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Robot's velocity in X relative to robot's forward direction.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "VelocityRelativeY": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Robot's velocity in Y relative to robot's forward direction.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "VelocityRelativeZ": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "Any",
        "description": "Robot's velocity in Z relative to robot's forward direction.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "ForwardX": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "-1 to 1",
        "description": "X component of robot's forward direction vector.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "ForwardY": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "-1 to 1",
        "description": "Y component of robot's forward direction vector.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "ForwardZ": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "-1 to 1",
        "description": "Z component of robot's forward direction vector.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "Orientation": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0-360",
        "description": "Robot's rotation in degrees.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "MineablesInVicinity": {
        "dataType": "Integer",
        "range": "0+",
        "description": "Number of mineable rocks detected nearby.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "MineablesInQueue": {
        "dataType": "Integer",
        "range": "0+",
        "description": "Number of mineable rocks in robot's mining queue.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "TemperatureExternal": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ K",
        "description": "External atmospheric temperature in Kelvin.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "PressureExternal": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ kPa",
        "description": "External atmospheric pressure in kPa.",
        "access": "Read"
      }
    },

  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingStructureInteriorDoorPaddedThin",
    "deviceTitle": "Interior Door Padded Thin",
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "On": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Door powered state.",
        "access": "Read Write"
      },
      "Power": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Returns 1 if door is powered.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "RequiredPower": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ W",
        "description": "Power draw in watts.",
        "access": "Read"
      },
      "Open": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Door open/closed state.",
        "access": "Read Write"
      },
      "Mode": {
        "dataType": "Integer",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Door mode: 0=Auto (opens automatically), 1=Manual (controlled only by logic/interaction).",
        "access": "Read Write"
      },
      "Lock": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Locks door preventing manual opening.",
        "access": "Read Write"
      },
      "Setting": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ seconds",
        "description": "Auto-close delay in seconds (for Auto mode).",
        "access": "Read Write"
      },
      "Idle": {

        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Returns 1 if door is not currently moving.",
        "access": "Read"
